core_philosophy: Premium startup-quality SaaS UI blending Stripe/Linear's precision and dark mode glow with Airbnb's approachable human-centric layouts. High-trust, ultra-efficient, modern, slightly architectural.

headings.styling: tracking-tight, leading-none, never centered by default

typography.instructions: Import Outfit and Manrope from Google Fonts via CSS. Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, or Lato for headings.

colors.instructions: Follow the 'Electric & Neon' meets 'Swiss & High-Contrast' archetype. Never use pure black (#000000). Use deep obsidian (#0A0A0A) tinted with blue. Highlight active states with the accent color. Always check APCA contrast guidelines.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-xl with bg-black/60 and a 1px border-white/10 for sticky headers, responsive sidebars, and modals. NEVER use fully transparent backgrounds where content scrolls underneath.
visual_enhancers.gradients: No generic full-screen gradients. Use subtle radial gradient orbs (blur-3xl, opacity-20) placed behind cards, sidebars, or hero sections to create 'ambient lighting'.
visual_enhancers.borders: Expose the grid layout with 1px subtle borders (border-collapse look) in dashboards. Apply 'Tracing Beam' glow for high-conversion buttons/cards.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimal shadows in dark mode; rely on 1px borders and inner glow (box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.1)) to lift elements.

grids_and_layouts.marketing_landing_page: Bento-style asymmetrical grids. Col-span variations (e.g., col-span-8 and col-span-4). Wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12). Heavy use of negative space for the Premium Landing Page.
grids_and_layouts.dashboards: High-density functional grid for Provider, Admin, and Customer roles. Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Use flat rectangular statistics cards.
grids_and_layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, or p-12 inside cards. Mobile-first padding (px-4 md:px-8).
grids_and_layouts.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Left-align text blocks by default, do not center-align everything.

components.buttons: Pill-shaped or sharp rectangular with 1px border. Include micro-interaction on hover (-translate-y-0.5, brighter text/bg). Only use primary color for main CTAs (Booking System).
components.cards: Modern Cards: Override default Shadcn with darker background, 1px subtle border, no drop shadow. Ensure inner padding is p-6+.
components.forms: Beautiful Forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select. Dark background inputs, border-white/10, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/50. Ideal for Profile Management and Service Booking.
components.navigation: Responsive Sidebar for dashboards, Sticky header for Landing Page. Use crystal glassmorphism effect.
components.toasts: Use Sonner component for non-intrusive notifications (CRUD Operations, Status Tracking).
components.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react or lucide-react. Keep stroke width consistent.

rules: Staggered entrance animations for lists/grids, especially for Search & Filter Service results.
Interactive elements must have clear hover and focus states.
Do NOT use 'transition: all'. Explicitly define transitions (e.g., 'transition-colors', 'transition-transform').

hero_background.description: Sleek modern kitchen design. Use with a heavy dark gradient overlay (bg-black/60) so text remains readable.

service_electrician.description: Electrician installing wiring. Perfect for service category cards.

service_cleaning.description: Elegant minimalist kitchen sink. Use for cleaning service details.

provider_profile_1.description: Confident smiling professional. Use for provider dashboards, ratings & reviews avatars.

provider_profile_2.description: Man wearing Henley top portrait. Use for customer profiles.

media_and_images.instructions: All images must have a maximum height of 80vh on mobile to prevent blocking. Use robust object-cover techniques for Image Upload placeholders.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets at least 4.5:1 against backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: The codebase uses .js/.jsx files (not .tsx). Output all React components and Shadcn customizations in standard JavaScript, adhering strictly to React+JS patterns.
NEVER use generic centered layouts or simplistic gradients.
NEVER use AI assistant emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡.
Create depth through layered design elements (z-index hierarchy).
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
DO NOT add '.App { text-align: center; }' in CSS.
Customize Shadcn components heavily to match the premium Linear-style dark theme. Ensure they don't look like default Vercel templates.
For complex interactions (dropdowns, date pickers for Booking System), ALWAYS use Shadcn, never raw HTML tags.
